effect: Strengthens []{type:dark} moves for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.

name: Fairy Aura
short_effect: Strengthens []{type:fairy} moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
effect: Strengthens []{type:fairy} moves for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.

name: Aura Break
short_effect: Makes []{ability:dark-aura} and []{ability:fairy-aura} weaken moves of their respective types.
effect: While this Pokémon is on the field, []{ability:dark-aura} and []{ability:fairy-aura} weaken moves of their respective types to 2/3 their power, rather than strengthening them.

name: Primordial Sea
short_effect: Creates heavy rain, which has all the properties of Rain Dance, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Fire moves to fail.
effect:
When this Pokémon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes heavy rain.  Heavy rain has all the properties of []{move:rain-dance} and also causes damaging Fire moves to fail.

Heavy rain ends when this Pokémon leaves battle or loses this ability, or when this ability is nullified.  The weather cannot otherwise be changed except by the effects of []{ability:delta-stream} and []{ability:desolate-land}.

[]{ability:air-lock} and []{ability:cloud-nine} will prevent the effects of heavy rain, including allowing Fire moves to work, but will not allow the weather to be changed.

name: Desolate Land
short_effect: Creates extremely harsh sunlight, which has all the properties of Sunny Day, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Water moves to fail.
effect:
When this Pokémon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes extremely harsh sunlight.  Extremely harsh sunlight has all the properties of []{move:sunny-day} and also causes damaging Water moves to fail.

Extremely harsh sunlight ends when this Pokémon leaves battle or loses this ability, or when this ability is nullified.  The weather cannot otherwise be changed except by the effects of []{ability:delta-stream} and []{ability:primordial-sea}.

[]{ability:air-lock} and []{ability:cloud-nine} will prevent the effects of extremely harsh sunlight, including allowing Water moves to work, but will not allow the weather to be changed.

name: Delta Stream
short_effect: Creates a mysterious air current, which cannot be replaced and causes moves to never be super effective against Flying Pokémon.
effect:
When this Pokémon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes a mysterious air current.  A mysterious air current causes moves to not be super effective against Flying; they do neutral damage instead.  []{ability:anticipation} and []{move:stealth-rock} are not affected.

The mysterious air current ends when this Pokémon leaves battle or loses this ability, or when this ability is nullified.  The weather cannot otherwise be changed except by the effects of []{ability:desolate-land} and []{ability:primordial-sea}.

[]{ability:air-lock} and []{ability:cloud-nine} will prevent the effect of a mysterious air current, but will not allow the weather to be changed.

name: Stamina
short_effect: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.
effect: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.

name: Wimp Out
short_effect: This Pokémon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.
effect: After this Pokémon is hit by a move, if that move caused this Pokémon's HP to drop below half, it switches out.

name: Emergency Exit
short_effect: This Pokémon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.
effect: After this Pokémon is hit by a move, if that move caused this Pokémon's HP to drop below half, it switches out.

effect: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by two stages when it's hit by a Water move.

effect: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.

name: Shields Down
short_effect: Transforms this Minior between Core Form and Meteor Form.  Prevents major status ailments and drowsiness while in Meteor Form.
effect:
When this Pokémon enters battle and at the end of each turn, if its HP is 50% or above, it changes into Meteor Form; otherwise, it changes into Core Form.  In Meteor Form, it cannot be given a major status ailment (though existing ones are not cured), cannot become drowsy from []{move:yawn}, and cannot use []{move:rest} (which will simply fail).

This ability cannot be copied, replaced, or nullified.  This ability only takes effect for Minior.

name: Stakeout
short_effect: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.
effect: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.

name: Water Bubble
short_effect: Halves damage from Fire moves, doubles damage of Water moves, and prevents burns.
effect: When this Pokémon is hit by a Fire move, the damage is halved.  When this Pokémon uses a Water move, the power is doubled. This Pokémon cannot be burned, and if it becomes burned, the burn is immediately cured.

name: Steelworker
short_effect: This Pokémon's Steel moves have 1.5× power.
effect: This Pokémon's Steel moves have 1.5× power.

name: Berserk
short_effect: Raises this Pokémon's Special Attack by one stage every time its HP drops below half.
effect: Whenever this Pokémon takes damage from a move that causes its HP to drop below 50%, its Special Attack rises by one stage.

name: Slush Rush
short_effect: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.
effect: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.

name: Long Reach
short_effect: This Pokémon's moves do not make contact.
effect: A move used by this Pokémon will not make contact.

name: Liquid Voice
short_effect: Sound-based moves become Water-type.
effect: When this Pokémon uses a move that is sound-based, that move's type is Water.

name: Triage
short_effect: This Pokémon's healing moves have their priority increased by 3.
effect: This Pokémon's healing moves have their priority increased by 3.

name: Galvanize
short_effect: This Pokémon's Normal moves are Electric and have their power increased to 1.2×.
effect: When this Pokémon uses a Normal moves, that move is Electric its power is 1.2×.

name: Surge Surfer
short_effect: Doubles this Pokémon's Speed on Electric Terrain.
effect: Doubles this Pokémon's Speed on Electric Terrain.

name: Schooling

effect:
If this Pokémon is a []{pokemon:wishiwashi} and level 20 or above, then when it enters battle and at the start of each turn, it becomes Schooling Form if its HP is 25% or higher and Solo Form otherwise.

This ability cannot be replaced, copied, or nullified.

name: Disguise
short_effect: Prevents the first instance of battle damage.
effect:
If this Pokémon is in its Disguised Form and takes damage from a move, it switches to its Busted Form and the damage is prevented.  Other effects are not prevented.

This ability cannot be copied or replaced.  This ability only takes effect for Mimikyu.

name: Battle Bond

effect:

effect:
Transforms 10% or 50% Zygarde into Complete Forme when its HP is below 50%.

This ability cannot be copied or replaced.  This ability only takes effect for Zygarde.

name: Corrosion

effect: This Pokémon's moves and item ignore the usual immunity of Poison and Steel Pokémon when attempting to inflict poison.

name: Comatose

effect: This Pokémon always acts as though it were Asleep.  It cannot be given another status ailment; it's unaffected by []{move:yawn}; it can use []{move:sleep-talk}; and so on.

name: Queenly Majesty
short_effect: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.
effect: When an opposing Pokémon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokémon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.

name: Innards Out

effect: When this Pokémon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokémon had remaining.

effect: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.

effect: Damage from contact moves is halved.  Damage from Fire moves is doubled.

effect: When an opposing Pokémon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokémon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.

If a hailstorm or snowstorm begins while Eiscue is in its Noice Face form, or if it is sent out in its Noice Face form during hail, it will immediately revert to its Ice Face form.

effect: The  Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

effect: The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web statuses. When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, its highest stat is boosted by 1 stage.
